changeSet.author: dimopoulosc
changeSet.comment: Make "UK ETS Registry Participants (MOHA)" Report publishable
changeSet.sql:
insert into section (id, section_type, report_type, title, summary, display_order, display_type, published_on, last_updated, status) values (nextval('section_seq'), 'ETS', 'R0044', 'UK ETS Registry Participants (MOHA)', 'The report includes the Account Holders for Maritime Operator Holding Accounts of the UK Emissions Trading Registry.', 3, 'ONE_FILE_PER_YEAR', null, now(), null);
insert into publication_schedule (id, section_id, publication_frequency, start_date, next_report_date, every_x_days, generation_date) values (nextval('publication_schedule_seq'), (select id from section where report_type = 'R0044'), 'DAILY', date_trunc('day', current_timestamp) + interval '24 hours', date_trunc('day', current_timestamp) + interval '48 hours', null, null);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM publication_schedule where section_id=(SELECT id FROM section where report_type='R0044'); DELETE FROM section where report_type='R0044';

changeSet.author: dimopoulosc
changeSet.comment: Forces the HTML publication migrator to run again.

changeSet.author: dimopoulosc
changeSet.comment: Fix display order for ETS sections
